data_notes: April 2025 data point marked null — NPCI.org.in returned HTTP 403 for direct fetch; PIB press release search did not surface April 2025 specific figure. All other months sourced from NPCI official releases cited in PIB/government press releases. npci.org.in/statistics/monthly-metrics is the canonical source.

series.source: NPCI monthly-metrics — April 2025 figure not retrieved (HTTP 403 on direct fetch; ACTION: manually verify at npci.org.in/statistics/monthly-metrics)
NPCI official data cited: 'surpassing Visa with over 65 crore daily transactions, Rs 25 lakh crore' — PIB/IBEF citing NPCI May 2025 release
NPCI official: 18.39 billion transactions, Rs 24.03 lakh crore — PIB press release citing NPCI June 2025 data
NPCI official: 19.47 billion transactions — cited as 'previous record' in October 2025 NPCI data coverage (PIB/IBEF)
NPCI official: 20+ billion transactions, Rs 24.85 lakh crore — PIB/IBEF citing NPCI August 2025 data; first month crossing 20bn milestone
NPCI official: 19.63 billion transactions, Rs 24.90 lakh crore — PIB citing NPCI September 2025 data
NPCI official: 20.7 billion transactions (festive month ATH at time), Rs 27.28 lakh crore — PIB/Upstox citing NPCI October 2025 data
NPCI official: 19+ billion transactions (23% YoY), Rs 26.32 lakh crore — PIB citing NPCI November 2025 data
NPCI official: 21.63 billion transactions, Rs 27.97 lakh crore — DFS/GOI Facebook post citing NPCI December 2025; Elets BFSI citing NPCI release
NPCI official: 21.70 billion transactions, Rs 28.33 lakh crore — startupnews.fyi citing NPCI January 2026 data release
NPCI official: 20.39 billion transactions (27% YoY), Rs 26.84 lakh crore — startupnews.fyi citing NPCI February 2026 data release
NPCI official: 22.64 billion transactions (record, 24% YoY), Rs 29.53 lakh crore — prokerala.com/socialnews.xyz/news9live.com all citing NPCI March 2026 data

notes: UPI crossed 20 billion monthly transactions for first time in August 2025. March 2026 set new all-time record at 22.64 billion. FY26 total: 218+ billion transactions. Value of Rs 29.53 lakh crore in March 2026 is highest ever monthly value.
